title: crotalaria bahiaensis
intro: Crotalaria bahiaensis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to Brazil. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria bahiaensis include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and aid in the management of diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
